category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Kenya market access under KEBS mandatory certification and ERC energy efficiency direction.

title.en: China-to-Kenya Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入肯尼亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入肯尼亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Kenya KEBS mandatory PVoC, Diamond Mark of Quality, KS IEC 60034 standards, and ERC energy efficiency labelling expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与肯尼亚 KEBS 强制 PVoC、Diamond Mark 品质认证、KS IEC 60034 标准及 ERC 能效标识要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與肯尼亞 KEBS 強制 PVoC、Diamond Mark 品質認證、KS IEC 60034 標準及 ERC 能效標識要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, KEBS conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current KEBS, ERC, CA, and KRA requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、KEBS 合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行 KEBS、ERC、CA 及 KRA 要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、KEBS 合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行 KEBS、ERC、CA 及 KRA 要求。

answer_first.en: Kenya requires KEBS mandatory PVoC (Pre-Export Verification of Conformity) inspection at origin before shipment and the KEBS Diamond Mark of Quality; KS IEC 60034 is adopted for motors; CCC is not recognised. The 415 V / 50 Hz grid differs from China's 380 V standard.
answer_first.zh: 肯尼亚要求在出货前在原产地进行 KEBS 强制 PVoC（出口前符合性验证）检验并获得 KEBS Diamond Mark 品质标志；肯尼亚采用 KS IEC 60034 电机标准；CCC 认证不被认可。肯尼亚电网为 415 V / 50 Hz，与中国 380 V 标准不同。
answer_first.zht: 肯尼亞要求在出貨前在原產地進行 KEBS 強制 PVoC（出口前符合性驗證）檢驗並獲得 KEBS Diamond Mark 品質標誌；肯尼亞採用 KS IEC 60034 電機標準；CCC 認證不被認可。肯尼亞電網為 415 V / 50 Hz，與中國 380 V 標準不同。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
